title: サボテン料理をご馳走デース！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's hella nutritious! I'll hook you up with some
too, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks, El! I've never had cactus before!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey Trainer! Do you want some cactus too?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My mama and papa sent me some to keep me
healthy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't believe it when El told me you can eat
cactus!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All kinds of ways! You can make it into steak, or
hamburgers, even smoothies!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! There's that many ways?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My papa taught me! Cactus is one of his
specialties!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm givin' you some too, Trainer! How do you want
it?
choice_data_list: I'd love to try a smoothie!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Steak is my go-to!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's hella filling, and it's great for diets too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's filling and good for diets?! Incredible! It sounds magical!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! You sure are curious about this, aren't
ya, Spe?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You can get hella strong and actually enjoy
dieting if you're eatin' cactus steak!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go to the dorm kitchen and get cooking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy the cactus steak that El Condor Pasa
prepared. However...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I ate too much... I can't move...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm so full... but I'm also so happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We learn that no matter how good something
may be for a diet, it's pointless if you eat too
much.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! Cactus is also great for calming you
down!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I see! If that's true, then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Can I become as calm as Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Maybe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the reason I'm so calm and collected is
because I drink so much cactus!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let the comment about her being "calm and
collected" slide so I can get a smoothie as soon as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa makes the cactus smoothies and
we take them to the cafeteria, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ouch! I forgot to take out the spikes! Ugh, my
cheek hella hurts!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! So that's what that was! Are you okay, El?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What?! Did you eat them, Spe?! Are you a
camel?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take care to avoid the cactus spikes and end up
enjoying the smoothie quite a bit.
